name: sosa-observes-subproperty-of-ssn-for-property
query: PREFIX sosa: <http://www.w3.org/ns/sosa/> PREFIX ssn: <http://www.w3.org/ns/ssn/> ASK WHERE { sosa:observes <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subPropertyOf> ssn:forProperty }

name: sosa-used-procedure-sensor-chain-declared
query: PREFIX sosa: <http://www.w3.org/ns/sosa/> PREFIX ssn: <http://www.w3.org/ns/ssn/> PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> ASK WHERE { sosa:usedProcedure owl:propertyChainAxiom ?chain . ?chain rdf:first sosa:madeBySensor ; rdf:rest ?tail . ?tail rdf:first ssn:implements ; rdf:rest rdf:nil . }
